heading: Regulation and examination
label: 2213 Regulation and examination
text: The corporations organized under this part shall be institutions of the Farm Credit System and shall be subject to the same regulation and examination by the Farm Credit Administration as are the organizing bank or banks under this chapter.
notes: Amendments1988— substituted “Regulation” for “Supervision” in section catchline.Pub. L. 100–2331985— substituted “regulation” for “supervision”.Pub. L. 99–205
